title: Korak 12

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]
        path_to_target.append(value_at_middle)
        
        if value == value_at_middle:
            return path_to_target
        elif value > value_at_middle:
            pass
        break
    
    return []

print(binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 3))
print(binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 9], 4))

def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]
        path_to_target.append(value_at_middle)
        
        if value == value_at_middle:
            return path_to_target
        elif value > value_at_middle:
            pass
        break
    
    return []

print(binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 3))
print(binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 9], 4))

tests.text: Trebalo bi da uklonite glavnu reč pass i ažurirate promene od low u mid + 1.

description:
Ako je uslov u elif tačan, onda ukloni glavnu reč iz pass i ažuriraj vrednost promene za low dodavanjem 1 za promenu mid.

Ovo će proširiti pretragu u desnu polovinu trenutnih zona pretrage na listi, jer ako je value veće od value_at_middle, to znači da value mora biti u desnoj polovini trenutne zone pretrage.
